name: list_emails
description: List recent emails from a user's Microsoft 365 mailbox. Returns subject, sender, date, and a preview of each email. Use this when the user asks about their emails, inbox, or messages.

user_email.description: The email address of the user whose mailbox to search

max_results.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default 10, max 25)

search_query.description: Optional search query to filter emails (searches subject and body)

folder.description: Mail folder to search (default 'inbox'). Options: inbox, sentItems, drafts

name: read_email
description: Read the full content of a specific email by its ID. Use this after list_emails to get the complete body of an email the user wants to see.

user_email.description: The email address of the user whose mailbox contains the email

message_id.description: The Microsoft Graph message ID of the email to read

name: send_email
description: Send an email on behalf of a user via Microsoft 365. IMPORTANT: Always confirm with the user before sending. Show them the recipient, subject, and body for approval first.

user_email.description: The email address of the user sending the email

name: list_calendar_events
description: List upcoming calendar events from a user's Microsoft 365 calendar. Returns event title, start/end times, location, and attendees. Use when the user asks about their schedule, meetings, or calendar.

user_email.description: The email address of the user whose calendar to check

days_ahead.description: Number of days ahead to look for events (default 7, max 30)

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 10, max 25)

name: search_files
description: Search for files in the user's OneDrive or SharePoint. Returns file names, paths, and last modified dates. Use when the user asks about documents stored in OneDrive or SharePoint.

search_query.description: Search query to find files by name or content

max_results.description: Maximum number of files to return (default 10, max 25)
